_comment2: Copy the servers you want into your opencode.json and set enabled: true

docs-search._description: Context7 — Search documentation for 30+ libraries (React, Next.js, Tailwind, etc.)

github._description: GitHub — Create PRs, manage issues, search code. Set GITHUB_TOKEN env var.

sequential-thinking._description: Sequential Thinking — Reflective reasoning for complex architecture and debugging.

sentry._description: Sentry — Production error monitoring. Requires OAuth auth.

postgres._description: PostgreSQL — Schema inspection, queries. Set DATABASE_URL env var.

filesystem._description: Filesystem — Secure file ops outside OpenCode worktree.

brave-search._description: Brave Search — Web search. Set BRAVE_API_KEY env var.

puppeteer._description: Puppeteer — Browser automation for testing and scraping.
